overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring heavy fog, neon-lit palm tree promenades, holographic advertisements, and a transition into a dark underpass with colorful digital billboards. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing cinematic lighting and atmospheric effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy palm tree lined promenade with modern architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a foggy sidewalk lined with palm trees and modern buildings illuminated by yellow neon accents

entered.detail: tall palm trees with uplighting lining the left side of the walkway
tall modern building with distinctive vertical yellow neon light strips
low shrubs and plants along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night in a futuristic city, walking along a palm tree-lined promenade. Modern buildings with yellow neon accents rise through the haze, and the atmosphere is thick with fog. The camera moves steadily forward toward a street intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with holographic advertising and light traffic

events.description: moving from palm tree promenade onto city street with large holographic billboard coming into prominent view

agents.ego_description: walking along the street sidewalk passing by a massive holographic Samurai advertisement while observing light traffic and occasional pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving down the street past the camera

entered.detail: large holographic advertisement displaying 'Samurai' with colorful graphics on building facade
multi-lane road with moving vehicle traffic
modern building with reflective glass windows lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to street level with a massive holographic Samurai billboard dominating the left side. The camera walks along the sidewalk as futuristic vehicles pass by on the road. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and modern glass buildings line the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with digital billboards

events.description: entering covered underpass area with overhead concrete structure blocking the sky
ambient lighting shifts to red neon glow from digital advertisements on left wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered underpass beneath the overpass, crossing the marked crosswalk while passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored jacket walking toward the camera in the underpass

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure overhead creating a covered walkway
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on ground
wall of large digital screens displaying colorful animated advertisements
large concrete pillar supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered underpass beneath an overpass, transitioning from open street to sheltered walkway. The space features a marked crosswalk and walls lined with bright digital billboards. The lighting shifts to a red neon glow from the advertisements, and several pedestrians walk through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed neon-lit corridor with continuous digital advertising walls

events.description: lighting shifts from red to green neon as passing different billboard sections
corridor becomes very dark with only billboard illumination and red neon lights visible

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dark enclosed corridor with shifting colored neon lights reflecting off the walls and floor

entered.detail: tight corridor walls creating a tunnel-like environment
deep shadow area at the end of the corridor with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper into the enclosed corridor, where the walls are lined with large digital billboards cycling through green, pink, and red neon colors. The space becomes increasingly dark, with only the artificial billboard illumination providing light. The corridor feels tunnel-like as it progresses toward a dark distant exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a foggy cyberpunk cityscape that gradually transitions from an open, neon-lit promenade into a dark, enclosed underpass. It begins by gliding past palm trees and yellow-accented buildings shrouded in a thick nocturnal haze, moving steadily toward a bustling street intersection. As the camera reaches the street level, the atmosphere opens up to reveal a massive holographic Samurai billboard and a flow of futuristic vehicles and pedestrians passing by glass skyscrapers. The scene then shifts as the camera enters a sheltered underpass, where the open sky is replaced by a ceiling and the lighting transforms into a saturated red neon glow from wall-mounted advertisements. Finally, the movement carries deeper into this tunnel-like corridor, where the environment grows increasingly dark and the only illumination comes from digital billboards cycling through vivid green, pink, and red hues.
